name: Hearty Chili Con Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried kidney beans in water overnight.
2. Cook the soaked beans for 1-1/2 hours until tender.
3. In a large pot, heat vegetable oil over medium heat.
4. Add chopped onion and garlic; sauté until fragrant.
5. Stir in salt, chili powder, and cumin.
6. Pour in tomato sauce and add frozen corn; simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Drain the cooked beans and stir into the pot with the sauce mixture.
8. Simmer for a few more minutes to combine flavors.
9. Serve over rice.
